texto: He thought, I got wings on my eyes, and the thought was so odd and yet so pleasing to him that he felt suddenly that he was immensely special, that there could be no one like him in the world.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Deborah Treisman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “He thought, I got wings on my eyes, and the thought was so odd and yet so pleasing to him that he…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, kindlehighlight, thought pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
